acceptance_criteria: All code paths that create OrchestratorTask instances are updated to no longer set scope, impact_area, estimated_effort, and resource_requirements fields.
The Scope enum, ImpactArea enum, and ResourceRequirements struct are removed from orchestrator-core/src/types.rs.
The estimated_effort field is removed from OrchestratorTask struct.
Any tests that reference the removed fields/enums are updated accordingly.
cargo check passes for orchestrator-core and orchestrator-cli crates.
Existing task JSON files in .ao/tasks/ remain valid (fields can be ignored on deserialization with serde default).
description:
Audit OrchestratorTask fields and remove those that have no CLI flags and always contain defaults. Fields to remove:
- `scope` (Scope enum): No CLI flags, always defaults to Medium, unused in routing/filtering
- `impact_area` (Vec<ImpactArea>): No CLI flags, defaults to empty vec, only used in is_frontend_related() which can be refactored
- `estimated_effort` (Option<String>): No CLI flags, always None, unused
- `resource_requirements` (ResourceRequirements): No CLI flags, always default, unused

Fields to retain:
- `complexity`: Used in daemon_scheduler for model routing decisions
- `risk`: Used in TaskFilter for task filtering
title: Audit and remove unused OrchestratorTask fields
